name: stripe
description: Stripe CLI - interact with Stripe via the command line

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Login using the console instead of the browser

options.name: --project-name
options.description: Store configuration under a specific project

options.name: --events
options.description: A comma-separated list of events to listen for (e.g., 'charge.succeeded,customer.created')

options.name: --forward-to
options.description: The URL to forward webhook events to (e.g., 'http://localhost:3000/webhook')

options.name: --forward-connect-to
options.description: The URL to forward Connect webhook events to

options.name: --print-json
options.description: Format output as JSON

options.name: --skip-verify
options.description: Skip certificate verification when forwarding to HTTPS endpoints

options.name: --use-configured-webhooks
options.description: Load webhook endpoint configuration from the API

options.name: --add
options.description: A comma-separated list of overrides to apply to the generated payload

options.name: --api-version
options.description: The API version to use for the generated event

options.name: --override
options.description: A comma-separated list of paths to JSON files containing payload overrides

options.name: --format
options.description: Specifies the output format (default, JSON)

options.name: --filter-account
options.description: Filter by account ID

options.name: --filter-api-version
options.description: Filter by API version

options.name: --filter-http-method
options.description: Filter by HTTP method

options.name: --filter-http-status
options.description: Filter by HTTP status

options.name: --filter-request-path
options.description: Filter by request path

options.name: --filter-source-ip
options.description: Filter by source IP

options.name: --filter-status
options.description: Filter by status (succeeded, failed)

options.name: --event
options.description: The ID of the event to resend

options.name: --webhook-endpoint
options.description: The ID of the webhook endpoint to resend the event to

globalOptions.name: --api-key
globalOptions.description: Your API key to use for the command

globalOptions.name: --config
globalOptions.description: Path to your CLI configuration file

globalOptions.name: --device-name
globalOptions.description: A customized device name for your CLI

globalOptions.name: --color
globalOptions.description: Turn on/off color output (on, off, auto)

globalOptions.name: --log-level
globalOptions.description: The logging level to use (debug, info, warn, error)

globalOptions.name: --project-name
globalOptions.description: The project name to read from for config
